reviews.author: Guest Traveler 1
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 30-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 2
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Great family vacation. The kids club kept the children busy all day, letting us relax in the adults-only Solarium. Slipped off to 30-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 3
reviews.title: Fantastic value
reviews.body: The ship was clean and well maintained. Wi-Fi was a bit slow in remote areas, but overall a great value cruise. Slipped off to 30-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

reviews.author: Guest Traveler 4
reviews.title: Perfect Getaway
reviews.body: Dining options were amazing. Specialty restaurants were worth the cover charge. The theater shows were Broadway quality. Slipped off to 30-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders and had a fantastic time.

seo.title: 30-Night Classic Mediterranean Wonders | Celebrity Beyond | Celebrity Cruises
seo.metaDescription: Book a 30-night Mediterranean cruise onboard Celebrity Beyond of Celebrity Cruises. Visiting Barcelona, Cannes, Genoa. Standard & luxury cabins available. Get a quote today.
